bioconda.name: megahit
bioconda.summary:
MEGAHIT: An ultra-fast single-node solution for large and complex
metagenomics assembly via succinct de Bruijn graph

biocontainers.name: megahit
biocontainers.summary: An ultra-fast single-node solution for large and complex metagenomics assembly via succinct de bruijn graph

biotools.summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.

bioschemas.name: MEGAHIT
bioschemas.summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.

galaxy.summary: A subprogram within the Megahit toolkit for converting contigs to assembly graphs (fastg)
galaxy.bio_tools_summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.
